response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The reference JSON did not provide lyrics for the 3rd Generation's song. Manual transcription was successfully performed.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used for structure, but manual translation and audio transcription were required for all speaking parts.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitled the silent kinetic typography from Tokino Sora's segment using the on-screen text exception rule, followed by the highly energetic voiceover and song lyrics during the Hololive 3rd Generation promo segment.

subtitles.english: In the middle of a dream...
The next stage they will challenge is...

subtitles.original: ホロライブ3期生ライブ！「#きゅるるん大作戦」〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜
subtitles.english: hololive 3rd Generation Live! #Kyururun Daisakusen ~The strongest idols, you have no choice but to support them~

subtitles.original: 「好き」と「かわいい」を詰め込んであなたと作る大作戦！
subtitles.english: A major operation packed with \"love\" and \"cute\" to create together with you!

subtitles.original: いっぱいのこれまでと、ときめくような一瞬を！
subtitles.english: All of our \"up until now\", and moments that make your heart flutter!

subtitles.original: どこまででも行けちゃう気がする！
subtitles.english: I feel like we can go absolutely anywhere!

subtitles.original: ちなみに作戦の内容は...とにかく可愛い！可愛いに満たされろ！
subtitles.english: By the way, the details of the operation are... anyway, cute! Be filled with cuteness!
